results.rendered_html:
apakṛta (von kar mit apa)
1〉 adj. zu Leide gethan: kiṃ mayāpakṛtaṃ tasya was habe ich ihm zu Leide gethan  VIŚV. 4,4 .  DAŚ. 1,25 . 27 . 36 .
— 2〉 n. Beleidigung: mitrasya caivāpakṛte wenn dem Alliirten eine Beleidigung angethan worden ist  M. 7,164 . viśeṣato 'napakṛte pareṇāpakṛte sati  N. 11,5 . =  HIḌ. 4,3 . paśya śatrughna kaikeyyā lokasyāpakṛtaṃ mahat  R. 2,81,5 .

apakṛta p. p.
1 Injured, wronged, wickedly or maliciously committed &c.
2 Done or practised as a degrading or impure act, as funeral rites.
— taṃ An injury, harm, offence.
